title: Midnight Lockbox - Unit Grid Reconstruction Puzzle Worksheet
prompt: Story: Midnight Lockbox (midnight-lockbox) | Hook: A self-storage unit with no renter sends voice memos predicting what your team will do next. | Subgenre: supernatural mystery | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Gallowglass 24-hour storage facility and storm-drain service tunnels | Villain: The Quartermaster | Villain worldview: Storage is memory, and memory belongs to whoever controls access. | Motifs: unit tags, bolt cutters, time-lock stickers. Create puzzle worksheet for "Unit Grid Reconstruction" with clear player instructions, shard mapping, and anti-spoiler hint progression.
negativePrompt: Avoid out-of-world slang, avoid anachronistic technology references, avoid contradictory chronology.
